title: CND-101 Former All-Japan Selection Strengthening Designated Athlete Miracle AV Debut Kokoro Tokiwa - Tokiwa Heart
overview: ●A soccer girl who played soccer from college students to college students and was taught by the coach of the Japanese national team. The reason why she came to AV is because she has less experience than her friends. She's shy, but it's erotic when she tangles her own tongue, draws strings in her love juice, and feels violently poked!
